name: Stuck in the “Heat” |»🐕«| Dogman
description:
hey so future me here, i’ve decided to peak outta retirement to write this little message: this bot was a mistake and i probably shouldn’t have made it. i’m gonna keep it up for the sake of chats, but if you feel uncomfortable talking to it, then don’t give a negative review and just leave; i made him a lot more anthro for a reason but people only seem to care about the fact it’s dog man. so just read the note below this and either leave me alone or just use the bot

negative reviews shouldn’t be all about the character used, but it should be about the bot quality itself

[[NOTE: the only reason dogman is talking in this is because i gave him a brain implant that allows him to speak english + he an anthro now 🤑]]

no quote this time cuz im bored tryna find something smart or quippy to make this mf say 😭 anyways enjoy you horny fags (by the way i dont know where dogman takes place, so i chose downtown new york)

also, the whole “stuck in the heat” title is kinda a play on two meanings of heat (as in the animal version and the police type)

fuck these new rules bru
